label: History Auto Recorder Group
description: Defines a named group of history recorders shown together as one graph tab in the History window, including optional y-axis scale and display constraints.

useFixedScale.label: Use fixed scale
useFixedScale.description: If true, the y-axis is locked to the range defined by fixedScale rather than auto-scaling to the data.

fixedScale.label: Fixed scale
fixedScale.description: Y-axis range (min, max) used when useFixedScale is true. Example: (0, 100).

integersOnly.label: Integers only
integersOnly.description: If true, the y-axis tick labels are rounded to integers.

onlyPositiveValues.label: Only positive values
onlyPositiveValues.description: If true, the y-axis minimum is clamped to zero so negative values are never shown.

devModeOnly.label: Dev mode only
devModeOnly.description: If true, this group tab is only visible when dev mode is enabled.

historyAutoRecorderDefs.label: History auto recorder defs
historyAutoRecorderDefs.description: Ordered list of HistoryAutoRecorderDefs whose series are drawn together in this group's graph.

basic-recorder-group.label: Basic recorder group
basic-recorder-group.description: A simple recorder group with auto-scaling y-axis.

fixed-scale-recorder-group.label: Fixed scale recorder group
fixed-scale-recorder-group.description: A recorder group with a locked y-axis range.

dev-recorder-group.label: Dev recorder group
dev-recorder-group.description: A recorder group only visible in dev mode.
